narrative:
Westland Township has 1,417 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
